SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class GenericConnectorEndpoint

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafioschtrader.entities.GenericConnectorEndpoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class GenericConnectorEndpoint extends BaseID<Integer> implements Serializable
Defines a single endpoint within a generic connector, specifying the URL template, response parsing configuration, and field mapping strategy for a specific combination of feed type (HISTORY/INTRA) and instrument type (SECURITY/CURRENCY). Each generic connector can have up to 4 endpoints.
See Also:
